BitRaser Unveils Mac® Erasure & Diagnostics Tool, Enabling ITADs to Save 30% Time with Parallel Processing BitRaser, a global leader in certified data erasure solutions, today announced the launch of its Integrated Mac® Eraser and Diagnostics Tool, a software designed to streamline IT asset disposition (ITAD) processes. The tool allows ITAD providers to simultaneously perform secure data erasure and comprehensive hardware diagnostics on macOS devices, including both Apple M-series and Intel-based Macs.
